welcome_title: 📚 Welcome to Simple Vocabulary Learning Software
welcome_subtitle: Click above to import CSV to start learning
listen_hint: 🎧 Click the button below to listen, then enter the word in the dialog
speak_hint: 🗣️ Say the English word/phrase, then click play to compare
read_hint: 📖 Understand the meaning of this word/phrase, then click play
write_hint: 💡 Write the English word/phrase based on the Chinese meaning above
listen_question:
What word/phrase did you hear?
Hint: {} characters
phrase_format: 【Compound Format】4 columns: Compound (multiple words),Phonetic,Meaning,Component singles and meanings
word_example1: structured,['strʌktʃəd],结构化的；有条理的,词根struct-（建造、构筑）；后缀-ure（名词后缀）；后缀-ed（形容词后缀）
phrase_example1: table salt,/'teɪbl sɔːlt/,食用盐,table (桌子) + salt (盐)
phrase_example2: look forward to,/lʊk 'fɔːrwərd tuː/,期待,look (看) + forward (向前) + to (到)
tip_text:
💡 Tips:
• Click 'Import CSV' to load your own language learning files
• Morpheme information will be displayed in prominent colors
